description_long: This is a freestanding, pavilion-style awning with a peaked, pyramid-shaped canopy supported by a rigid frame. The canopy is a light gray color and features prominent blue phoenix graphics on each side, along with the word 'GRIMBERGEN' and the year '1128' printed on the valance. The structure is open on three sides, with the rear side fully enclosed by a solid panel. The frame appears to be made of metal, providing stability and support for the fabric canopy. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for use in public spaces such as plazas, parks, or event areas. The branding and graphics give it a distinctive, eye-catching appearance.
description: A freestanding, peaked awning with a gray canopy, blue phoenix graphics, and 'GRIMBERGEN 1128' branding, supported by a metal frame and open on three sides.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the blue phoenix graphic, 'GRIMBERGEN 1128' branding, and the open front and left sides.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the central 'GRIMBERGEN 1128' branding and symmetrical blue phoenix graphics on both sides.
description_view_2: Front-right view displaying the right-side phoenix graphic, branding, and the open right and front sides.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid back panel with a partial blue phoenix graphic at the top and no visible branding.
attribute_canopy_pattern: solid gray with large blue phoenix graphics and black text
attribute_branding_or_signage: Displays 'GRIMBERGEN 1128' text and blue phoenix logo on all visible sides of the canopy and valance.
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed metal frame with four vertical posts and horizontal beams
